name: orchestration
description: Autonomous agent pair tooling for AgentFlow FORGE-SENTINEL architecture

interface.longDescription: Provides skills, hooks, and commands for autonomous agent orchestration including FORGE (implementation), SENTINEL (review), NEXUS (coordination), VESSEL (CI/CD), and LORE (documentation) agents.
defaultPrompt: Use FORGE skills for autonomous code implementation.
Use SENTINEL skills for code review and quality assurance.
Use NEXUS skills for task coordination and triage.
Use VESSEL skills for CI/CD pipeline management.
Use LORE skills for documentation generation.
